---
title: "Nora Müller"
about:
  id: me
  template: trestles
  image: img/pink2.png
  image-shape: round
---

:::{#me}

## Who

I’m an empirical social scientist with an analytical focus. I hold a PhD and an MA in Sociology.

## What

My research is on social inequality with a special focus on wealth inequality and family-related topics.

## Where

I work as a Senior Researcher at [GESIS - Leibniz Institute for the Social Sciences](https://www.gesis.org/home) in Mannheim, Germany, where I am the Project Manager of the [German International Social Survey Programme](https://issp.org/member-states/germany/) (ISSP).


## Contact

[nora.mueller@gesis.org](mailto:nora.mueller@gesis.org)


Follow me on [BlueSky](https://bsky.app/profile/nrmllr.bsky.social) ![](img/bluesky.png){width=5%}

:::
